selections.name: Kinda Krazy
selections.reason: Top class and speed figures in this field. Ran a strong race at Colonial previously and looks primed to handle this distance.

selections.name: Lucky Tin Tin
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount. Showed decent early speed at Laurel and should benefit from the shift to Colonial's sweeping turns.

selections.name: Maggies Brew
selections.reason: Consistent Tampa form translates well here. Possesses a solid finishing kick that suits the long stretch.

selections.name: Lil Miss Perfect
selections.reason: Gets first-time Lasix today. Could see a significant performance upgrade with this equipment change.

danger_horse.name: Lady Lyla
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of competitive speed figures but must overcome an inconsistent form cycle.

selections.name: Frye Island (ire)
selections.reason: Farrior and Vargas are a lethal combination. Strong turf sprinter dropping from tougher company.

selections.name: Sinetic
selections.reason: Excellent turf sprint form. Possesses the tactical speed to sit just off the pace and swoop late.

selections.name: Beltane
selections.reason: Highly consistent turf performer from Laurel. Sweeping turns here will aid his sustained closing style.

selections.name: Jungle Glow
selections.reason: Jamie Ness trainee with Paco Lopez up. Always competitive and must be respected on the ticket.

danger_horse.name: Uptowneagleslanded
danger_horse.reason: Deep closer who will relish the long stretch run if the early pace melts down.

selections.name: Sisu Spirit
selections.reason: Ran a stellar debut at Gulfstream Park. Clearly the class of the field if replicating that effort on dirt.

selections.name: Souper Athlete
selections.reason: Trombetta-trained firster with excellent pedigree. Working very sharply leading up to debut.

selections.name: Paris By Night
selections.reason: John Robb trainee with solid Laurel form. Should be forwardly placed from the start.

selections.name: Saiyaara
selections.reason: Despite the overweight, has shown enough early speed to secure a competitive position.

danger_horse.name: Ashley H
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter with a pedigree built for sprinting. Watch the board for late money.

selections.name: Better Every Day
selections.reason: Stellar debut performance on wet dirt. Pedigree strongly suggests turf will trigger an even better effort.

selections.name: Mountain Mamba
selections.reason: Excellent debut effort finishing strongly. Long stretch here is perfect for her closing style.

selections.name: Royal Companion
selections.reason: Trombetta-trained filly who finished with interest in debut. Paco Lopez takes the reins.

selections.name: Millford Lass
selections.reason: Well-bred first-time starter showing a series of steady, encouraging turf works.

danger_horse.name: Cakey
danger_horse.reason: Brittany Russell debutante with Sheldon up. Must be respected based on connections alone.

selections.name: Irish Gent (ire)
selections.reason: Class of the race. Drops out of tough New York allowance company and loves the distance.

selections.name: La Houligan
selections.reason: Consistently competitive on dirt, but pedigree screams turf. Major threat if handling the surface.

selections.name: Some Performance
selections.reason: First start since being gelded. Brendan Walsh trainee has back class that fits perfectly here.

selections.name: Dr. Park
selections.reason: Peter Eurton shipper with solid southern California form. Fits well with these Mid-Atlantic types.

selections.name: Bourbon Dream
selections.reason: Highly consistent turf form. Possesses a strong tactical gear to sit a perfect trip.

selections.name: Skycross
selections.reason: Excellent runner-up finish last time out. Sweeping turf course fits his closing style perfectly.

selections.name: Kiss The Ring
selections.reason: Solid third-place effort at this distance. Daniel Centeno retains the mount on this progressive gelding.

selections.name: Mighty Mike
selections.reason: Jorge Panaijo takes over. Showed late interest in previous turf route and could surprise at odds.

danger_horse.name: M D Fieldstone
danger_horse.reason: Ran a competitive race at Laurel and should appreciate the long stretch run.

selections.name: Tigre
selections.reason: Extremely consistent at this level. Possesses a strong late kick that is custom-made for this course.

selections.name: Bodecream
selections.reason: Classy veteran who loves the Colonial turf. Expect a big performance second off the layoff.

selections.name: Arjay
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and tactical speed. Will secure a great pocket trip from the rail.

selections.name: Italian Symphony
selections.reason: Possesses solid back class and a competitive turf record. Dangerous if allowed to dictate terms.

danger_horse.name: Mo Rewards
danger_horse.reason: Jamie Ness trainee who won last out on turf. Must be respected in current form.

selections.name: Blazing Bridgette
selections.reason: Highly consistent turf sprinter stretching out to a mile. Class of the field and the one to beat.

selections.name: Light De Night
selections.reason: Solid runner-up finish on this course last time out. Paco Lopez retains the mount.

selections.name: Global Consort
selections.reason: Shipper from California with solid turf form. Major threat if handling the shipping transition.

selections.name: Beautiful Emma
selections.reason: Consistent turf form at Gulfstream translates well here. Solid late kick makes her a threat.

danger_horse.name: Snowglobe
danger_horse.reason: Finished strongly behind the top choice last time out. Will benefit from any pace meltdown.
